id.title: Connection id
id.description: Stable unique id used for config updates, routing metadata, and diagnostics.

name.title: Connection name
name.description: Human-readable label shown in the dashboard and diagnostic output.

baseUrl.title: Base URL
baseUrl.description: Root URL of the upstream connection. Trailing slashes are trimmed during normalization.

connector.title: Connector
connector.description: Protocol adapter used for this backend.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether the connection is eligible for routing and health monitoring.

maxConcurrency.title: Max concurrency
maxConcurrency.description: Maximum number of simultaneous leased requests allowed on this connection.

healthPath.title: Health path
healthPath.description: Optional connector-specific path used for health checks instead of the built-in default.

models.title: Models
models.description: Explicitly allowed model ids or wildcard patterns for this connection.

headers.title: Headers
headers.description: Static string headers sent to the upstream connection for every request.

apiKey.title: API key
apiKey.description: Secret upstream credential. This field is write-only and must never be re-exposed by public config reads.

apiKeyEnv.title: API key env
apiKeyEnv.description: Optional environment variable name whose value takes precedence over the stored API key.

timeoutMs.title: Request timeout override
timeoutMs.description: Optional per-connection request timeout override in milliseconds.

monitoringTimeoutMs.title: Monitoring timeout override
monitoringTimeoutMs.description: Optional per-connection health check timeout override in milliseconds.

monitoringIntervalMs.title: Monitoring interval override
monitoringIntervalMs.description: Optional per-connection health check interval override in milliseconds.

energyUsageUrl.title: Energy usage URL
energyUsageUrl.description: Optional absolute URL of a backend energy endpoint returning current total power draw as JSON with a numeric total_power_w field. Used to estimate per-request energy usage in watt-hours.

requestTimeoutMs.title: Request timeout
requestTimeoutMs.description: Maximum time in milliseconds that an upstream request may run before the AI client aborts it.

queueTimeoutMs.title: Queue timeout
queueTimeoutMs.description: Maximum time in milliseconds that a request may wait for a free connection slot.

healthCheckIntervalMs.title: Health check interval
healthCheckIntervalMs.description: Interval in milliseconds between connection health refreshes when a connection does not override it locally.

recentRequestLimit.title: Recent request limit
recentRequestLimit.description: Maximum number of recent requests retained in memory for diagnostics and the dashboard.

connections.title: Connections
connections.description: Configured upstream AI connections that the AI client may route requests to.
